name: Workflow A del 2 - Skriv til Neo4j

parameters.jsCode:
const plant = $input.item.json;

const query = `
MERGE (p:Plant {name_en: $name_en})
SET p.name_latin = $name_latin,
    p.name_da = $name_da,
    p.type = $type,
    p.source = $source,
    p.edible = $edible

WITH p

FOREACH (fam IN CASE WHEN $family IS NOT NULL THEN [$family] ELSE [] END |
  MERGE (f:Family {name: fam})
  MERGE (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(f)
)

FOREACH (soil IN $prefers_soil |
  MERGE (s:SoilType {name: soil})
  MERGE (p)-[:PREFERS_SOIL]->(s)
)

FOREACH (m IN $prefers_moisture |
  MERGE (moist:Moisture {name: m})
  MERGE (p)-[:PREFERS_MOISTURE]->(moist)
)

FOREACH (n IN $depletes |
  MERGE (nut:Nutrient {name: n})
  MERGE (p)-[:DEPLETES]->(nut)
)

FOREACH (n IN $restores |
  MERGE (nut:Nutrient {name: n})
  MERGE (p)-[:RESTORES]->(nut)
)

FOREACH (season IN $grows_in |
  MERGE (s:Season {name: season})
  MERGE (p)-[:GROWS_IN]->(s)
)

FOREACH (other IN $helps |
  MERGE (o:Plant {name_en: other})
  MERGE (p)-[:GROWS_WELL_WITH]->(o)
)

FOREACH (other IN $helped_by |
  MERGE (o:Plant {name_en: other})
  MERGE (o)-[:GROWS_WELL_WITH]->(p)
)

FOREACH (other IN $avoid |
  MERGE (o:Plant {name_en: other})
  MERGE (p)-[:ANTAGONIZES]->(o)
)

FOREACH (other IN $follows_well_after |
  MERGE (o:Plant {name_en: other})
  MERGE (p)-[:FOLLOWS_WELL_AFTER]->(o)
)

FOREACH (other IN $avoid_after |
  MERGE (o:Plant {name_en: other})
  MERGE (p)-[:AVOID_AFTER]->(o)
)
`;

const params = {
  name_en: plant.name_en || '',
  name_latin: plant.name_latin || null,
  name_da: plant.name_da || null,
  type: plant.type || null,
  source: plant.source || null,
  family: plant.family || null,
  edible: plant.edible !== undefined ? plant.edible : null,
  prefers_soil: plant.prefers_soil || [],
  prefers_moisture: plant.prefers_moisture || [],
  depletes: plant.depletes || [],
  restores: plant.restores || [],
  grows_in: plant.grows_in || [],
  helps: plant.helps || [],
  helped_by: plant.helped_by || [],
  avoid: plant.avoid || [],
  follows_well_after: plant.follows_well_after || [],
  avoid_after: plant.avoid_after || [],
};

const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({
  method: 'POST',
  url: 'http://127.0.0.1:7474/db/neo4j/tx/commit',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'Authorization': 'Basic ' + Buffer.from('neo4j:hajiyard2026').toString('base64')
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    statements: [{
      statement: query,
      parameters: params
    }]
  })
});

return {
  json: {
    name_en: plant.name_en,
    name_da: plant.name_da,
    name_latin: plant.name_latin,
    type: plant.type,
    source: plant.source,
    edible: plant.edible,
    family: plant.family,
    prefers_soil: plant.prefers_soil || [],
    prefers_moisture: plant.prefers_moisture || [],
    depletes: plant.depletes || [],
    restores: plant.restores || [],
    grows_in: plant.grows_in || [],
    helps: plant.helps || [],
    helped_by: plant.helped_by || [],
    avoid: plant.avoid || [],
    follows_well_after: plant.follows_well_after || [],
    avoid_after: plant.avoid_after || [],
    status: response.errors?.length === 0 ? 'ok' : 'error',
    errors: response.errors
  }
};
